name: Adders & Discounts
author: Kevin
description: Universal modifier pipeline for pricing — covers product-level adders, standalone line items, and net adjustments. Explores a four-stage order of operations and how the three modifier types compose together in a single quote.

name: Text Variables
author: Kevin
description: Parameterized proposal copy for heat pump and energy efficiency products. Explores how dynamic variables can personalize boilerplate sections without requiring manual edits per proposal.
